type_error_policy: The pycairo C module exercises CPython capsule wrappers. Cairoon tests the corresponding Cairo object/status behavior through typed MoonBit APIs; the CPython extension ABI itself is an explicit product decision.

static_api: pub fn Surface::image(Format, Int, Int) -> Self raise CairoError
test_create_image_surface.adaptation: A native MoonBit Surface wrapper replaces PycairoSurface_FromSurface while preserving checked image creation and owned Cairo lifetime.

static_api: pub fn Context::new(Surface) -> Self raise CairoError
pub fn Context::get_target(Self) -> Surface raise CairoError
test_create_context.adaptation: Context::new and referenced get_target wrappers replace PycairoContext_FromContext, including target retention after the original Surface binding leaves scope.

runtime: src/tests/status/core/status_error_test.mbt::status error mapping classifies every cairo status
static_api: pub fn check_status(Status) -> Unit raise CairoError
test_check_status.adaptation: Known Cairo statuses map to typed CairoError suberrors. Pycairo_Check_Status's arbitrary raw integer input belongs to the CPython C API; cairoon's closed Status type rejects unknown values at the conversion boundary instead of preserving an untyped integer payload.

test_capi.adaptation: The tested py3cairo.h type table and From* functions are a CPython extension ABI. Cairoon directly wraps Cairo objects as MoonBit external objects and deliberately exports no Python capsule table.
